prompt: How to keep language bar / keyboard layout select always active?
evidence: Maybe this is a XY problem, let me start with the real issue: When I do some stuff on my Windows machine, I often tend to use the tray icons (click them). Sometimes they jump around. I want to stop the icons from jumping to the left when I click the tray area. I have identified the cause of jumping around to be the keyboard layout / language selector tool. Here you can see it's not present (when I use snip tool or RDP): But when I click on the tray area, the keyboard layout changer appears: this gets me every time . I just want to change my sound volume. When I need to click other icons, the "jump" causes me to move icons around, which is annoying because that works against my muscle reflexes. Is there any solution to either: Not let the tray icons jump around? Keep the keyboard layout option always enabled? P.S. I have another work machine that I access via RDP, the keyboard layout changer is always enabled there - which means this is possible to fix?
